about.title: A versatile group, headquartered in Muscat, working across four continents.
about.lead: Yanabiya Gulf International Business & Trade delivers internet services, software solutions, IT consulting, trade and business automation across the Gulf, Asia, Europe and North America.
about.mission: To deliver top-class internet services and optimal software solutions at reasonable prices, complemented by consulting and business process outsourcing — built on three pillars: People, Process, and Clients.
about.vision: To become a leading global performer in providing quality web and software development solutions, leveraging professional talent from agency, corporate, and private sectors to help clients accelerate growth.
about.goal: To expand our global footprint while creating sustainable value for partners, employees, and societies.

businesses.title: Six divisions powering enterprises and trade across continents.
businesses.sub: From enterprise software to international trade — built end-to-end.

it-software.body: Custom software, web platforms, ERP, and AI solutions.

export-import.title: Export & Import Business

panel.overviewDesc: Yanabiya Group operates six diversified business divisions, each independent yet aligned under one strategic group vision.

solutions.title: Engineered to solve real business problems.
solutions.sub: A modern technology stack delivered by experienced engineers — from custom software to cloud, security and analytics.

partnerships.title: Powered by the world's leading technology providers.
partnerships.sub: We partner with global technology leaders to deliver enterprise-grade solutions across cloud, software, hardware and security.

global.title: Operating across four countries with nine entities.
global.sub: Our Yanabiya Group company currently operates in four countries, and we plan to gradually expand by entering more markets in the future. In each country, we are continuously upgrading and expanding our business categories day by day.

csr.title: Giving back to the communities we serve.
csr.sub: Yanabiya Group is committed to structured charitable donations and welfare programmes — focused on transparency and lasting impact.

welfare.d: Humanitarian aid programmes across the regions we operate in.

education.d: Scholarships and skill-development initiatives for under-served communities.

health.d: Supporting clinics, mobile camps, and emergency relief.

empower.d: Vocational training and small-business support to enable livelihoods.

sustainability.title: Sustainable Growth
sustainability.desc: Building business practices that protect the environment and support long-term value for every stakeholder we serve.

green.d: Energy-efficient offices and responsible resource usage across all branches.

circular.d: Reuse, recycle and minimise waste across procurement, packaging and logistics.

climate.d: Tree plantation drives and lower-emission business models for long-term impact.

inclusive.d: Fair employment, local hiring, and supplier partnerships that strengthen communities.

community.title: Community Care
community.desc: Structured charitable donations and welfare programmes focused on transparency, dignity, and lasting impact.

network.title: Trusted Network
network.sub: Connecting Opportunities Worldwide to Build Strong, Scalable Global Businesses.

leadership.title: Guided by experience. Driven by integrity.
leadership.sub: Our leadership team unites decades of global enterprise expertise with deep regional insight across the Gulf, South Asia, the UK, and the USA — leading with clarity, accountability, and a long-term vision for sustainable growth.
leadership.chairmanMsg: Yanabiya Group represents the Stamp of Quality & Professionalism. Our success comes from upholding core values rather than taking shortcuts. We deliver what we promise and place customer satisfaction above all — supported by a dedicated after-sales division ensuring service excellence.
leadership.viceChairmanMsg: Our website introduces our vision, mission, infrastructure, expertise, and future plans. We invite prospective clients and partners to explore our divisions and connect with us.
leadership.tier1Tagline: The Governing Body of Yanabiya Group
leadership.tier1Sub: The Board of Members exercises the highest level of fiduciary responsibility over Yanabiya Group, providing independent oversight, long-term strategic direction, and institutional accountability across all operating jurisdictions — Oman, the United Kingdom, the United States, and Bangladesh.

strategy.title: Where strategy meets execution.
strategy.sub: Our innovation roadmap is built on four pillars that align technology, talent and process with measurable client outcomes.

digital.d: Helping enterprises modernise legacy systems and adopt cloud-first architectures.

talent.d: Cultivating multidisciplinary teams across four countries.

process.d: Balancing speed, quality and cost in every engagement.

customer.d: Solutions designed around client problems, not generic templates.

cloud.d: AWS and Azure architecture and managed services.

data.d: Dashboards, ETL pipelines and decision intelligence.

insights.title: Thinking from the Yanabiya team.
insights.sub: Articles, case studies and thought leadership covering digital transformation, trade, security and cloud adoption.

careers.title: Build your career with a global group.
careers.sub: Join a team that values craftsmanship, ownership, and continuous learning.
careers.sendCv: Send your CV and a short note about what you'd like to work on.

global.d: Work across four countries and dozens of industries.

stack.d: Cloud, AI, security and full-stack engineering.

growth.d: Flexible, rewarding paths with real ownership.

culture.d: Teamwork-first with recognition for individual impact.

aboutPage.heroPara: A diversified international group operating as one platform, across technology, trade, talent, and consulting in four countries.

sectors.body: One operating discipline across tech, trade, and talent.

countries.label: Four countries
countries.body: Oman HQ, with teams in the UK, Bangladesh, and USA.

trust.label: Decade of trust
trust.body: 10+ years of compounding partnerships across borders.

identity.title: Who we are.
identity.p1: Yanabiya Group is a diversified global enterprise originating in Al Khuwair, Muscat, operating today across the United Kingdom, Bangladesh, and the United States.
identity.p2: We don't run as a single-sector company. We run as a platform, where multiple ventures share one operating discipline and one long-term horizon, while remaining independent where they need to be.
identity.p3: That structure is how a six-sector group stays coherent across four countries. Innovation, execution, and operational capability move together, not in silos.

mission.title: Why we exist
mission.body: Build, scale, and operate diversified ventures with technology, trade, and trust at the centre, across every market we enter.

vision.title: Where we're going
vision.body: A trusted global ecosystem where many businesses share one operating discipline, one set of values, and one long-term horizon.

values.title: How we work
values.body: Quality before scale. Relationships before transactions. People before process. Three rules, applied without exception.

ourStory.heroPara: A decade of building enterprises across four countries, written one relationship, one delivery, one chapter at a time.
ourStory.s03Title: The next decade isn't about more.
ourStory.s03Para: Deeper expertise across our six sectors. Deeper trust with the communities we serve. Deeper connections across the four countries we already call home.
ourStory.s07Para: Profit isn't the only thing we measure. Across every country we operate in, we commit to community welfare programmes, education access, and environmental responsibility, because long-term value isn't built any other way.
ourStory.s08Title: Trusted by enterprises across four continents.
ourStory.s09Para: Whether you're scaling a venture, sourcing a partner, or entering a new market, let's talk about what's possible.
storyLines: It started in Muscat, one office, one belief.
That trust outlasts trends, and craftsmanship outlasts shortcuts.
A decade on, that belief reaches four countries and six sectors.
We didn't set out to build a single company.
We set out to build a platform, where many ventures could share one spine.
Today, every Yanabiya business runs on the same operating principles.
Quality before scale. Relationships before transactions. People before process.
From Gulf trade routes to UK boardrooms.
From Dhaka engineering floors to Texas advisory rooms,
we connect markets, capital, and capability.
And the story is still being written.

milestones.title: Founded in Muscat
milestones.body: Yanabiya Gulf International Business & Trade SPC opens its doors in Al Khuwair.

milestones.title: Trade routes expand
milestones.body: Cross-border operations established across Gulf and South Asia corridors.

milestones.title: Engineering hub
milestones.body: Bangladesh delivery centre launches, software, QA, and 24x7 support.

milestones.title: European footprint
milestones.body: Yanabiya Gulf International UK Ltd. registered in London for EMEA operations.

milestones.title: North America entry
milestones.body: Yanabiya Gulf International US LLC opens in Austin, Texas.

milestones.title: Group platform
milestones.body: Six diversified business units operating under one unified ecosystem.

OM.body: Where the story began. Our Muscat office anchors group strategy, regulatory intelligence, and Gulf trade operations.

GB.body: A London base for client engagements, partnerships, and regulated advisory work across EMEA.

BD.body: Our engineering and apparel hub. Where craft meets capacity, at scale, with discipline.

US.body: Frontier-tech advisory and partner network for the Americas, from Austin into the wider continent.

leaders.name: Founder & Chairman
leaders.quote: We deliver what we promise, and we measure ourselves by what survives the year, not the quarter.

leaders.name: Vice Chairman
leaders.quote: Our job is to make a four-country group feel like one team in one room.

missionInAction.body: Every engagement starts with a single question, would we be proud of this in five years?
Most of our business comes from clients who came back. That's the only metric we trust.
Process serves people, not the other way around. We hire well and we trust deeply.

donation.foundationDesc: Established to serve communities across Oman, Bangladesh, the United Kingdom and the USA, we direct charitable funds to those who need them most with full transparency and Islamic integrity. Every programme is managed by a dedicated team and reviewed by a Shariah board.
donation.getInTouchDesc: Questions about our programmes, how we serve each cause, or need help with your donation? Our team responds within one business day.
